acholi.build_an_equivalent_ratio_family: Ger dul pa ratios ma rom
acholi.equivalent_ratio_table_for: Table me ratios ma rom pi
acholi.top_line_value_per_interval: Welo me raya malo pi interval acel
acholi.bottom_line_value_per_interval: Welo me raya piny pi interval acel
acholi.n_1_top_unit_corresponds_to: Unit 1 me raya malo rwate ki
acholi.per_interval_and_the_bottom_line_incre: pi interval acel, ki raya piny medde ki
acholi.enter_an_amount_greater_than_zero_for_: Ket welo ma dit loyo zero pi yero aryo ducu.
acholi.both_options_have_the_same_cost_per_un: Yero aryo ducu tye ki cost per unit acel.
acholi.option_a_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option A tye ki cost per unit ma nok.
acholi.option_b_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option B tye ki cost per unit ma nok.
acholi.adjust_the_values_so_both_unit_rates_s: Yub welo wek unit rates aryo ducu gubed i learning-model range.
acholi.rate_outside_model_range: Rate tye woko me model range
acholi.a_fair_comparison_divides_each_cost_by: Poro ma atir poko cost acel acel ki welo ne kikome. Kit ma tye bene twero bedo ki kwo maber, balo, onyo mite mukene.
acholi.this_example_is_above_the_1000_learnin: Lapor man okato kikom me 1000% pa learning model. Yub part onyo whole.
acholi.this_result_is_above_the_1_000_000_qua: Adwogi man okato kikom me welo 1,000,000. Yub welo pa lapor.
acholi.the_percent_is_not_defined_when_the_wh: Percent pe kimiyo koda ka whole obedo zero. Ket whole ma ber wek iger tepu.
acholi.the_whole_is_not_defined_when_the_perc: Whole pe kimiyo koda ka percent obedo zero. Ket percent ma ber wek iger tepu.
acholi.ten_equal_sections_each_represent_10_o: Sections apar ma rom, acel acel cung pi 10% me whole acel.
acholi.no_sections_are_filled: Pe tye section mo ma opong.
acholi.each_outlined_section_is_exactly_10_of: Section acel acel ma kigoyo raya ne obedo mom 10% me whole acel. Section ma opong nucu nyuto fraction ma atir me 10% meno.
acholi.enter_at_least_two_valid_coordinate_pa: Ket kal ariyo me coordinate ma atir, kacel ki acel ma welo x ne pe zero.
acholi.not_proportional_the_evidence_does_not: Pe proportional: caden pe nyuto unit rate acel ma pe lokke ma kato ki i origin.
acholi.x_values_comma_separated_2: Welo me x, kipoko ki comma
acholi.y_values_comma_separated_2: Welo me y, kipoko ki comma
acholi.use_the_same_number_of_x_and_y_values_: Tii ki kwan acel me welo x ki y. Graph me quadrant mukwongo man mito namba ma pe piny me zero i raya acel acel.
acholi.fix_the_coordinate_list_before_making_: Yub list me coordinate ma peya iketo tam i kom proportionality:
acholi.table_and_unit_rate_evidence: Caden ma a ki i table ki unit rate
acholi.no_valid_paired_rows_yet: Peya tye raya ma kiribo ma atir.
acholi.a_proportional_model_ray_is_extended_t: Ray me proportional model kimede ki i origin.
acholi.no_complete_set_of_points_is_available: Pe tye set me points ma opong me goyo graph.
acholi.table_evidence_all_defined_y_x_values_: Caden me table: welo ducu me y ÷ x ma kimiyo rom ki
acholi.the_entered_points_include_0_0_and_fol: points ma kiketo tye ki (0,0) dok gilubo ray me model.
acholi.the_model_ray_extends_the_constant_rel: ray me model mede wat ma pe lokke ki i (0,0), kadi bed pe kiketo origin.
acholi.check_for_changing_y_x_values_a_nonzer: Nen ka tye welo me y ÷ x ma lokke, welo y ma pe zero ka x = 0, onyo points ma pe tye i raya atir acel ma kato ki i origin.
acholi.back_to_stem_tools: Dok i jami tic me STEM
acholi.move_between_representations_and_expla: Wot i kin representations ki tit wat me anyodo.
acholi.best_for_fair_comparisons_because_ever: Ber loyo pi poro ma atir pien kit acel acel kicoyo odoco pi unit acel.
acholi.a_ratio_measured_against_a_whole_of_10: Ratio ma kipimo ki whole me 100; tii ki part = percent × whole.
acholi.a_straight_line_through_the_origin_sho: Raya atir ma kato ki i origin nyuto multiplier acel ma pe lokke ki i x nio i y.
acholi.estimate_first_preserve_units_and_ask_: Tam mukwongo, gwok units, ki peny ka welo aryo ducu olokke ki i yo me anyodo.
